title: Not your right to be heard
description: On April 7, 2026, a Division Bench of the Supreme Court of India has authoritatively settled the contours of natural justice applicable to the classification of bank accounts as fraud under the RBI’s framework for fraud classification. (“RBI Master Directions”). The judgment clears the uncertainty caused by divergent High Court rulings on whether borrowers are entitled to a personal hearing or copies of entire forensic audit reports. For banks, the ruling offers much needed clarity on process an
